releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## What's Changed
* feat(settings): add option to disable [div] paragraph wrapping by @salockhart in https://github.com/salockhart/obsidian-bbcode/pull/6
* Add list style option for [LIST]/[*] BBCode format by @salockhart in https://github.com/salockhart/obsidian-bbcode/pull/7


**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/salockhart/obsidian-bbcode/compare/1.2.0...1.3.0

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
- Adds support for multiple templates, based on path prefix
- Adds support for slicing and dicing the content of the note, using expressions like:
    - `{note[0]}` to print the first character of the note
    - `{note[1:]}` to print everything _after_ the first character of the note
    - `{note[:10]` to print the first 10 characters of the note

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
- Adds support for a container template in settings
- Adds support for copying just the selected text

releases.author: salockhart
releases.description:
Initial Release

- "Convert to BBCode & Copy to Clipboard" action
